description: Deterministic minimum controls for the fictional NovaMind AI vendor approval workflow.

rules.description: Annual recurring cost above EUR 15,000 requires director approval.
rules.suggested_request: Provide the current written offer showing annual recurring cost and all mandatory charges.

rules.description: Customer Data and backups require written EU or EEA-only confirmation.
rules.missing_evidence: Written confirmation covering Customer Content, backups, and core processing in the EU or EEA
rules.suggested_request: Confirm in writing that Customer Content, backups, and core processing for this tenant will remain in the EU or EEA.

rules.description: A DPA executed by both parties is required before Customer Data is uploaded.
rules.missing_evidence: DPA execution evidence for both parties
rules.suggested_request: Provide a Data Processing Addendum executed by authorized representatives of both parties.

rules.description: SOC 2 Type II or equivalent assurance must be issued; planned or in-progress status is insufficient.
rules.missing_evidence: Issued SOC 2 Type II report or documented equivalent assurance
rules.suggested_request: Provide the issued SOC 2 Type II report, a dated issuance confirmation, or documented equivalent assurance.

rules.description: Any material conflict in the assessment requires human review.
rules.missing_evidence: Resolution or acknowledgement of each material document conflict
rules.suggested_request: Resolve or explicitly acknowledge the conflicting vendor statements before the final decision.

rules.description: Assessment confidence below 70 percent requires human review.
rules.missing_evidence: Higher-confidence evidence or explicit human assessment of uncertainty
rules.suggested_request: Review the low-confidence findings and obtain additional evidence where material.
